examples: He had written letters on official notepaper to promote a relative's company.
He reached into his pocket and withdrew a sheet of notepaper.
My computer is broken so I have to use notepaper.
One MP says she has just 30 sheets of headed notepaper left, but cannot get her claims accepted when she tries to buy more.
Despite the headed notepaper, they are mercifully free from political topspin.
